mapper.select:
SELECT r.ROOM_TYPE_ID AS room_type_id, r.FK_HOTEL_ID AS brand_id, h.HOTEL_NAME AS hotel_name, r.ROOM_GRADE AS room_grade, r.BED_TYPE AS bed_type, r.VIEW_TYPE AS view_type, r.ROOM_NAME AS room_name, r.ROOM_SIZE AS room_size, r.MAX_CAPACITY AS max_capacity, r.TOTAL_COUNT AS total_count, r.BASE_PRICE AS base_price, r.APPROVE_STATUS AS approve_status, i.IMAGE_URL AS image_url
FROM ROOM_TYPE r
JOIN TBL_HOTEL h ON r.FK_HOTEL_ID = h.HOTEL_ID LEFT JOIN ROOM_IMAGE i ON r.ROOM_TYPE_ID = i.ROOM_TYPE_ID AND i.IS_MAIN = 'Y'
WHERE r.IS_ACTIVE = 'Y' AND h.ADMIN_NO = #{adminNo} AND r.APPROVE_STATUS = 'APPROVED' ORDER BY r.ROOM_NAME
mapper.insert:
SELECT seq_room_type.currval FROM dual
INSERT INTO room_type ( room_type_id, fk_hotel_id, room_name, room_grade, bed_type, view_type, base_price, max_capacity, total_count, approve_status ) VALUES ( seq_room_type.nextval,
(SELECT hotel_id FROM tbl_hotel WHERE admin_no = #{admin_no}),
#{room_name}, #{room_grade}, #{bed_type}, #{view_type}, #{base_price}, #{max_capacity}, #{total_count},
#{approve_status} )
INSERT INTO ROOM_IMAGE ( IMAGE_ID, ROOM_TYPE_ID, IMAGE_URL, IS_MAIN, SORT_ORDER ) VALUES ( SEQ_ROOM_IMAGE.NEXTVAL, #{fk_room_type_id}, #{image_url}, 'Y', 1 )
mapper.select: SELECT rt.room_type_id, rt.room_name, rt.room_grade, rt.bed_type, rt.view_type, rt.base_price, rt.max_capacity, h.hotel_name FROM room_type rt JOIN tbl_hotel h ON rt.fk_hotel_id = h.hotel_id WHERE rt.approve_status = 'PENDING' ORDER BY rt.room_type_id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ROOM_APPROVAL_HISTORY VALUES( SEQ_ROOM_APPROVAL_HISTORY.NEXTVAL, #{room_type_id}, #{status}, #{reason}, #{admin_id}, SYSDATE )
